channel.title: Health and Wellness on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Health and Wellness on MinWeb

item.title: Gym Story Saturday: Why Your Gym Anxiety Is Normal
item.description: If you’ve ever felt like the gym is less of a sanctuary and more of a social experiment gone wrong, you aren’t alone. We’ve all been there: staring at a machine we don’t know how to use, watching someone occupy an entire row of dumbbells for their “private” workout, or wondering if that guy in the leather jacket is actually training or filming an avant-garde music video. Honestly, some of these people act like they’re the only ones who pay a membership fee.
